description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 4 hrs 16 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 1 hr 2 mins. His activity was mostly in Java (52%), with Markdown (19%) and Other (27%) making up the rest. The data shows work across 3 projects, but no public GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories this week.
